ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the transaction */,
  "particulars" TEXT /* Particulars or description of the transaction */,
  "bill_invoice" TEXT /* Amount of the bill or invoice */,
  "collection" TEXT /* Amount collected */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account associated with the transaction */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the transaction */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the transaction occurred */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the transaction */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax applied to the transaction */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the transaction */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the transaction */,
  "is_overdue" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is overdue */,
  "is_reconciled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction has been reconciled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES transaction_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_tax_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_id") REFERENCES taxes ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES transaction_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "is_reconcilable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction type can be reconciled */,
  "is_taxable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction type is taxable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the account */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the account */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the account */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the invoice */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., issued, paid, overdue) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the invoice */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the invoice was generated */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the invoice */,
  "is_overdue" INTEGER /* Indicates if the invoice is overdue */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the invoice is paid */,
  "due_amount" TEXT /* Remaining amount due on the invoice */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the invoice */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the invoice */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cheque, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., processed, pending) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the payment */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the payment was made */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the payment */,
  "is_partial" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment is partial */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the payment record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the payment record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the user account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the department */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the department was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., invoice, receipt) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the document */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_documents_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_documents_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial document associated with the audit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the audit trail */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the audit trail was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the audit trail */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the audit trail was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES financial_documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the tax */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., VAT, sales tax) */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Amount of tax */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate */,
  "tax_description" TEXT /* Description of the tax */,
  "tax_jurisdiction" TEXT /* Tax jurisdiction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the tax record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tax record was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the tax record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the tax record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxes_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxes_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_users" (
  "audit_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the audit */,
  "audit_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the audit process */,
  "audit_department" TEXT /* Department the audit user belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the audit user record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the audit user record was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the audit user record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the audit user record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_users_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., balance sheet, income statement) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the transaction category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction category was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the transaction category */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction subcategory */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the transaction subcategory */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction subcategory was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the transaction subcategory */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction subcategory was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES transaction_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_subcategories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_subcategories_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
